instruction: Recolor the SAME character into an icy blue winter palette. Keep identical shape, pose, proportions, and outline — only the colors change.
Show the SAME character in a mid-walk side stride pose. Keep identical identity, palette, proportions, and art style.
Show the SAME character in a dynamic spell-casting / attack pose. Keep identical identity, palette, proportions, and art style.
Create a matching enemy: a small goblin, in the EXACT same art style, palette, outline weight, and pixel density as the reference. Different character, same game world.
